decision:decision_kb5_mcp_search.detail: KB-5 false negative resolved via MCP search: AfterValidator annotation propagation bug in FastAPI 0.115.8 traced to PR #13314's Pydantic 2.11 compat change that stripped Annotated metadata. Root cause documented in references/python-pydantic-audit-rules.md (3 detection rules). Knowledge-gap-closure pattern validated: MCP search + doc fetch + rule synthesis + reference file persistence.
